Default Prove-Up Hearing.
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Bruce Chan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Kathryn Rowe, Esq. for Plaintiff Tap Plastics, Inc..
Plaintiff's Witnee Carole Bremer, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, matter is taken under submission. Ms. Rowe to prepare and submit the declarations with the break-down of the amount of the invoices, and attorney fees requested.
